name: 01 Welcome
title: Welcome to German A1
description: CEFR A1 roadmap, sounds, gender, word order, study plan, and how to use these chapters.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Humanities & Languages / Global Languages / German / German (A1) / 01 Welcome

name: 02 Greetings and alphabet
title: Greetings, politeness, and the German alphabet
description: Guten Tag, du/Sie, Bitte/Danke, ä ö ü ß, spelling, and first dialogues.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Humanities & Languages / Global Languages / German / German (A1) / 02 Greetings and alphabet

name: 03 Numbers and articles
title: Numbers and definite articles (der, die, das)
description: Counting, simple prices, plural *die*, learn noun + article as one chunk.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Humanities & Languages / Global Languages / German / German (A1) / 03 Numbers and articles

name: 04 Present tense and verb second
title: Present tense (regular) and verb-second word order
description: Endings *‑e/‑st/‑t*, yes/no questions, W‑questions, *sein/haben*, light modals.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Humanities & Languages / Global Languages / German / German (A1) / 04 Present tense and verb second

name: 05 Existence es gibt
title: Existence: *es gibt* and *da ist/sind*
description: General existence, questions, negation with *kein/keine*, and common confusions.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Humanities & Languages / Global Languages / German / German (A1) / 05 Existence es gibt

name: 06 Final Exam
title: Certification Exam: German A1
description: Greetings, sounds, numbers, articles, present tense, and *es gibt*. Pass the majority to certify A1.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Humanities & Languages / Global Languages / German / German (A1) / 06 Final Exam
